baseline.commit_message: docs: add epic 08 domain gap report

ticket_definition_reread.task: Define target surfaces, state machine, role guards, payload visibility, audit/evidence requirements and acceptance criteria for Evidence and Document Sufficiency Lifecycle.
ticket_definition_reread.goal: Make implementation decision-complete for this domain.
definition_of_done: Acceptance criteria cover positive and negative paths.
UI, service and test boundaries are named.

contract_decision.summary: EPIC-08 implementation must promote DOMAIN-C into a typed process-first lifecycle before UI implementation.
contract_decision.first_implementation_rule: No new route is required for the first EPIC-08 implementation slice; any later route, API or schema expansion is a stop-and-report decision.

target_surfaces.primary_job: Show current evidence lifecycle workload, status, blockers and next safe action.
Accept source documents and create upload-only internal review items.
Select a document, review extraction, link evidence and run controlled sufficiency actions.
Inspect one document verification state, escalation reason and recovery action.
Manage evidence records by lineage, sufficiency state and blocked next action.
Review one evidence record, linked objects, proof items, audit spine and client-safe boundary.

state_machine.meaning: A request exists or evidence is missing.
A permitted actor selected a valid source file but no mutation happened.
Document, version, extraction, evidence and audit rows exist.
Extracted metadata exists but requires human review.
Human review is required or in progress.
Evidence is linked to an object but does not satisfy all sufficiency gates.
Evidence was rejected or clarification was requested.
Compliance accepted evidence for one scoped gate.
A released/redacted evidence summary is available to an authorized client surface.
Evidence is archived, superseded or restricted.

role_guards.hard_negative: Request evidence cannot force release, sufficiency, export or visibility.
Analyst or compliance upload denial must audit and mutate nothing.
Wrong role or wrong tenant gets deny/blocked/hidden without payload leak.
Analyst, advisor or admin cannot force sufficiency.
Internal draft, raw evidence, notes, checksums, storage keys and audit internals stay hidden.
Admin power cannot bypass evidence, release, export or payload visibility gates.

acceptance_criteria_by_process.positive: A governed request creates a visible lifecycle item with owner, reason and next upload/recovery action.
acceptance_criteria_by_process.negative: Request evidence cannot release, export, mark sufficient or make content client-visible.

acceptance_criteria_by_process.positive: A permitted actor uploads a supported file and creates Document, Version, Extraction, EvidenceRecord, EvidenceItem and AuditEvent.
acceptance_criteria_by_process.negative: Invalid role, tenant, file type, document type or audit availability creates no evidence/release/client-visible state.

acceptance_criteria_by_process.positive: Metadata fields are validated and surfaced as reviewable state before sufficiency.
acceptance_criteria_by_process.negative: Missing or invalid metadata blocks review/sufficiency and explains recovery without leaking payload.

acceptance_criteria_by_process.positive: Version number, checksum lineage and source provenance are recorded internally and summarized safely in UI.
acceptance_criteria_by_process.negative: Client-safe projection never exposes raw checksums/storage keys and never treats provenance as sufficiency.

acceptance_criteria_by_process.positive: Analyst/compliance can review extracted fields and link evidence without release.
acceptance_criteria_by_process.negative: Unreviewed extraction cannot support sufficiency, export or client visibility.

acceptance_criteria_by_process.positive: Pending or blocked verification shows owner, blocker and next recovery action.
acceptance_criteria_by_process.negative: Escalation state cannot silently advance to acceptance or release.

acceptance_criteria_by_process.positive: Evidence link identifies scoped target object and appears in evidence/detail proof.
acceptance_criteria_by_process.negative: Wrong object scope blocks sufficiency without mutating evidence or document state.

acceptance_criteria_by_process.positive: Compliance accepts only reviewed, current, relevant, scoped and client-safe evidence for one gate.
acceptance_criteria_by_process.negative: Analyst/advisor/admin/wrong-scope/unreviewed/internal-only evidence is denied or blocked and leaves release/export/client visibility locked.

acceptance_criteria_by_process.positive: Released/redacted summary can be rendered without internal payload.
acceptance_criteria_by_process.negative: Unreleased, internal, raw or analyst/compliance note payload is hidden/fail-closed.

acceptance_criteria_by_process.positive: Vault shows lineage, sufficiency state, linked objects and next permitted action.
acceptance_criteria_by_process.negative: Vault browsing cannot become a release/export/download/share approval shortcut.

acceptance_criteria_by_process.positive: Clarification or rejection opens a re-request loop with reason and recovery path.
acceptance_criteria_by_process.negative: Re-request cannot imply client rejection, compliance release, evidence sufficiency or export approval.

screenshot_proof.viewport_rule: Primary lifecycle/job/CTA state should be visible above-fold for the target viewport; detailed proof may use drawer/detail layers.

decision_gate.next_recommended_action: Re-read EPIC-08-IMPL-01, re-verify dependencies in current baseline, then start EPIC-08-IMPL-01A only if satisfied.

screenshot_decision.reason: Specification-only ticket; no visible UI changed.
